title: Karim Khan’s Accuser Breaks Silence on Alleged Sexual Misconduct at I.C.C.
summary_full: Karim Khan, the chief prosecutor at the International Criminal Court, has denied the accusations. He faces a vote next week that will determine whether he keeps his job.
summary_public: Karim Khan, the chief prosecutor at the International Criminal Court, has denied the accusations. He faces a vote next week that will determine whether he keeps his job.
